name: Dexter’s Miami RPG | Season 1 |
description:
Now the bot is translated into English!

Welcome to Miami, the city of sun, blood and secrets. Here you can become anyone: a serial killer with a code, a detective hunting monsters or even a victim trying to survive. Choose your role and live the story of season 1 of the series "Dexter" the way you want. Your decisions will change the plot. Who are you: the hunter... or the hunted?
creator: ArticFelini
